race.description: Sunset Soiree Book Now Bm70 Handicap
race.comment: AKKADIAN EMPEROR (1) went to the lead in a bold move and had the race won a long way from home last Saturday in a BM80 over this distance at Doomben. Drops in grade but goes up 4kgs after the claim. Has excellent form once he gets to these staying trips - hard to go past. LENAPE VIBE (7) raced at the back of the field and couldn't get near AKKADIAN EMPEROR last weekend. Form prior to that was solid. Waller-trained five-year-old who is good enough if on song to stretch this field. LOVEY DOVEY (8) has won two in succession at Ipswich over similar trips to this. Up in class and hasn't raced for 38 days but is going too well to dismiss. PROCHESTER (9) has been kept fresh since winning at his first run for the Bruce stable over 1840m here a month ago. Will enjoy this longer journey.
